title: Encryption, spyware, and now Mythos: History shows why cyber export control doesn’t work
summary: Export controls on cybersecurity software have been ineffective for three decades, and experts question whether new restrictions will succeed, particularly regarding Anthropic's Mythos model. The article examines the historical failure of cyber export policies.
content: For the last 30 years, stopping the flow of cybersecurity-related software has proven to be ineffective. It's unclear why it would work now with Anthropic’s cybersecurity model Mythos.

zh.title: 加密、间谍软件以及现在的Mythos:历史表明为什么网络出口管制行不通
zh.summary: 三十年来,对网络安全软件的出口管制一直没有取得成效,专家质疑新的限制措施是否能够成功,尤其是针对Anthropic的Mythos模型。这篇文章深入探讨了网络出口政策在历史上的失败。

title: Go eyes robotaxis and acquisitions after Japan’s biggest IPO of 2026. Here’s why it matters
summary: Go, the Japanese ride-hailing platform, completed Japan's largest IPO of 2026, raising approximately ¥88.6 billion to address the country's driver shortage through robotaxi development and acquisitions. The IPO signals renewed momentum for Japan's capital markets.
content: Go’s IPO — Japan’s biggest so far this year — has done more than provide a much-needed boost to the country’s languishing listing season. It has also supplied the taxi-hailing app with the capital required to address an existential issue: Japan’s shortage of drivers. Go, which went public Tuesday, plans to use the ¥88.6 billion […]

zh.title: Go在日本2026年最大IPO后瞄准自动驾驶出租车和收购。以下是为什么这很重要
zh.summary: 日本打车平台Go完成了日本2026年规模最大的IPO,融资约¥88.6亿日元,以通过自动驾驶出租车开发和并购来应对该国的驾驶员短缺问题。此次IPO标志着日本资本市场出现新的增长势头。

title: Nothing cancels this year’s CMF phone due to RAM prices
summary: Nothing has cancelled its planned CMF budget phone for 2026 due to elevated RAM prices doubling production costs, making it impossible to maintain the product's value proposition. The cancellation highlights the broader impact of memory chip inflation on consumer hardware.
content:
Nothing's next budget phone is the latest victim of RAMageddon. As 9to5Google reports, Nothing co-founder Akis Evangelidis announced in a post on X that a follow-up to the CMF Phone 2 Pro won't be coming this year:
We were working on a successor but with memory prices where they are right now, we can't build a phone that feels like a genuine step forward at a price that makes sense for CMF. As a result, we've decided not to launch a new CMF phone this year.
Last week, Nothing CEO and co-founder Carl Pei also said the RAM shortage has impacted the cost of the company's mid-range phone, stating, "For Phone 4A, memory costs doubled between  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nothing因RAM价格上涨取消今年CMF手机
zh.summary: 由于RAM价格上升导致生产成本翻倍，Nothing已取消其2026年计划推出的CMF预算手机，使其无法维持产品的价值主张。此举凸显了存储芯片价格上涨对消费硬件的广泛影响。

title: Aura’s impressive e-ink photo frame doesn’t even look digital
summary: Aura has launched the Aura Ink, an e-ink photo frame that delivers the functionality of digital frames while maintaining an analog aesthetic that doesn't resemble traditional digital displays. The product reimagines a mature consumer category with new display technology.
content: What’s the most cliche possible gift you can give a relative? A digital photo frame, displaying a rotating slideshow of family photos. Now Aura has completely refreshed this product space with its gorgeous Aura Ink frame, which uses e-ink to create a display that doesn’t even look digital. Digital frames have always been so popular […]

zh.title: Aura令人印象深刻的电子墨水相框看起来根本不像数字产品
zh.summary: Aura推出了Aura Ink电子墨水相框，它提供数字相框的功能，同时保持着看起来不像传统数字显示屏的模拟美学。该产品用新的显示技术重新定义了成熟的消费类别。

title: NASA selects Eric Schmidt’s rocket company for a 2028 mission to Mars
summary: Relativity Space, led by former Google CEO Eric Schmidt, has been selected by NASA to launch the Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028 under a public-private partnership. The mission will provide the first integrated daily global view of Martian winds, temperatures, dust, and clouds to inform safer landing systems.
content:
Relativity Space’s CEO is former Google executive Eric Schmidt. | Image: Alexander Tamargo / Getty Images	

Relativity Space, the rocket company led by former Google executive Eric Schmidt, was picked to launch NASA's Aeolus payload to Mars in 2028, as reported earlier by TechCrunch. Under a new public-private partnership, Relativity Space will provide the "spacecraft, rocket, and cruise operations" to fly Aeolus to Mars, where the payload will "provide the first integrated, daily, global view of Martian winds, temperatures, dust, and clouds." 
The Aeolus payload will have four instruments on board for studying the Martian atmosphere, which NASA says will "directly inform entry, descent, and landing systems and support safer, more predictable mis …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NASA选择Eric Schmidt的火箭公司执行2028年火星任务
zh.summary: 由前谷歌CEO Eric Schmidt领导的相对论太空公司已被NASA选中，将在2028年根据公私合作伙伴关系向火星发射Aeolus有效载荷。该任务将首次提供火星风、温度、尘埃和云的综合每日全球视图，以帮助改进更安全的着陆系统。

title: Hue’s wired wall modules bring non-smart lights into its ecosystem
summary: Philips Hue introduced wired wall switch modules that retrofit behind existing switches to integrate non-smart lights into its smart ecosystem. The company also launched more affordable Play lamps and upgraded E14 candle bulbs with expanded white spectrum and Matter-over-Thread support.
content:
The new Wired Wall Switch Modules fit behind existing switches. | Image: Signify	

Smart lighting company Philips Hue has launched its first wired wall modules. Installed behind existing wall switches, the new devices bring non-smart lights into the Hue ecosystem for the first time. Hue also announced new Play table and floor lamps that are more affordable versions of its Signe series, along with upgrades to its E14 candle bulbs that add a broader white light spectrum and Matter-over-Thread compatibility.
The new lights are now available globally; however, the Wired Wall Switch Modules are Europe-only. Signify CTO George Yianni told The Verge that there are currently no plans to launch them in the US, but the company woul …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Hue有线墙壁模块将非智能灯纳入其生态系统
zh.summary: 飞利浦Hue推出了有线墙壁开关模块，可以安装在现有开关后面，将非智能灯集成到其智能生态系统中。该公司还推出了更便宜的Play灯，并升级了E14蜡烛灯，扩展了白色光谱范围并支持Matter over Thread。

title: Every fusion startup that has raised over $100M
summary: Fusion energy startups have collectively raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority concentrated among a handful of leading companies. The report examines startups that have secured over $100 million in funding.
content: Fusion startups have raised $7.1 billion to date, with the majority of it going to a handful of companies.

zh.title: 所有融资超过1亿美元的核聚变初创公司
zh.summary: 核聚变能源初创公司迄今共筹集了71亿美元，其中大多数资金集中在少数领先公司手中。该报告审查了已获得超过1亿美元融资的初创公司。

title: Is the US government’s Anthropic ban accidentally helping the brand?
summary: The US government forced Anthropic to withdraw its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models citing national security concerns, though cybersecurity researchers argue similar vulnerabilities exist in competing models. The regulatory action raises questions about whether the enforcement inadvertently enhances Anthropic's market positioning.
content: Just as last week was ending, the US government forced Anthropic to pull its two newest models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, citing national security concerns after Amazon researchers allegedly found a way to bypass Fable 5’s guardrails.  Cybersecurity researchers have since signed an open letter calling the move dangerous, and Anthropic itself noted the same jailbreaks exist in other models. So is […]

zh.title: 美国政府对Anthropic的禁令是否意外地帮助了该品牌?
zh.summary: 美国政府以国家安全为由强制Anthropic撤回其Fable 5和Mythos 5模型，但网络安全研究人员辩称竞争对手的模型中存在类似的漏洞。这项监管行动引发了人们对该执法措施是否意外增强了Anthropic市场地位的质疑。

title: Billionaire Ambani wants AI in every call, app, and home
summary: Billionaire Mukesh Ambani's Reliance Industries is integrating artificial intelligence across telecommunications services reaching over 500 million users. The strategy aims to embed AI throughout calls, applications, and connected home devices.
content: Reliance is weaving AI into telecom services used by more than 500 million people.

zh.title: 亿万富翁安巴尼希望在每个通话、应用和家庭中植入人工智能
zh.summary: 亿万富翁穆克什·安巴尼的信实工业公司正在其电信服务中整合人工智能，覆盖超过5亿用户。该战略旨在在通话、应用和联网家居设备中嵌入人工智能。

title: The NTS Radio Player brings the best of internet radio to your hi-fi
summary: NTS Radio partnered with Swedish audio company Atonemo to release a $179 dedicated player delivering 24-bit/192kHz audio quality for NTS streams and other services. The device supports AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify Connect, and Tidal, with adapters for vintage hi-fi systems.
content:
Have I found my Chromecast Audio replacement? | Image: NTS Radio	

NTS Radio and Swedish audio company Atonemo have teamed up on a dedicated player that brings NTS's genre-defying mixes and streaming stations to almost any stereo or speaker setup. And, like Atonemo's existing Streamplayer, you can also listen to your favorite streaming services with it, using AirPlay 2, Google Cast, Spotify Connect, or Tidal Connect.
The $179 NTS Radio Player puts out 24-bit / 192kHz audio over a standard 3.5mm audio jack and comes with an adapter cable for connecting to RCA on your vintage hi-fi system, or whatever other speakers you have lying around. The top of the device has two buttons for tuning in directly to NTS 1  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NTS Radio播放器为您的高保真音响带来互联网电台的最佳体验
zh.summary: NTS Radio与瑞典音频公司Atonemo合作推出售价179美元的专用播放器，为NTS流媒体和其他服务提供24位/192kHz音频质量。该设备支持AirPlay 2、Google Cast、Spotify Connect和Tidal，并配备适配器以兼容老式高保真音响系统。

title: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
summary: Director Luca Guadagnino's film "Artificial" starring Andrew Garfield as OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM Studios. The film dramatized Altman's five-day termination and reinstatement in 2023 and featured a cast including Monica Barbaro and Ike Barinholtz.
content:
Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. 
The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman's termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in the works for about a year. The cast also includes A Complete Unknown actress Monica Barbaro as OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk, and Anora's Yura Borisov as OpenAI chief scientist Ilya Sutskever.
In a statement to Deadline, the studio said it believes the movie "will be better served if it were released by a different studio and is working closely with the filmmak …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 关于萨姆·奥特曼的电影被亚马逊MGM工作室下架
zh.summary: 导演卢卡·瓜达尼诺执导的电影《Artificial》由安德鲁·加菲尔德饰演OpenAI首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼，已被亚马逊MGM工作室下架。该电影戏剧化了奥特曼在2023年五天被解除职务和复职的经历，演员阵容包括莫妮卡·巴巴罗和艾克·巴林霍尔茨。

title: Our long national sunscreen nightmare is almost over
summary: The article examines viral TikTok trends promoting false claims about natural sun tolerance and antioxidants providing sunburn protection. The misinformation discourages sunscreen use among young audiences despite being scientifically debunked.
content:
You need a quarter teaspoon for your face alone, a half teaspoon if you include the neck (which you should!)	

This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here.
On TikTok, the tanned youths are explaining why they no longer wear sunscreen. In one video, a young man films himself in the ocean while describing how you can naturally build up a "solar callus" or sun tolerance to getting burned. (You can't.) In another, a young woman confidently states that eating healthy foods full of polyphenols and other antioxidants will help make your body more resilient to sunburn. (Antioxidants help w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我们长期的防晒噩梦即将结束
zh.summary: 该文章审视了在TikTok上传播的虚假声明，宣传关于天然阳光耐受性和抗氧化剂能提供防晒保护的错误观点。尽管这些错误信息在科学上已被驳斥，但仍在劝阻年轻观众使用防晒霜。

title: Rocket Report: Rebuild begins at Blue Origin launch pad; Relativity targets Mars
summary: Blue Origin begins reconstruction at its launch pad while Relativity Space advances Mars mission preparations. A French launch startup has discontinued its rocket's original name due to trademark complications.
content: A French launch startup is scrapping the name of its rocket, apparently due to a trademark issue.

zh.title: 火箭报告：蓝色起源发射场重建启动；相对论太空公司瞄准火星
zh.summary: 蓝色起源公司开始重建其发射场，而相对论太空公司推进火星任务的准备工作。一家法国发射初创公司因商标问题而停止使用其火箭的原始名称。

title: The CEO of Allbirds’ new AI biz has a plan, but no employees
summary: Allbirds' CEO has launched a new AI business with significant funding but no team yet. The company structure is unusual—essentially a well-funded solo founder startup—leaving questions about execution and growth strategy.
content: Call it a startup with a sole founder and a very large seed round, but what's next is less clear.

zh.title: Allbirds首席执行官的新AI业务有计划，但没有员工
zh.summary: Allbirds首席执行官推出了一项新的AI业务，获得了大量融资但目前没有团队。公司结构不同寻常——本质上是一个资金充足的单人创始人初创公司——对执行和增长战略提出了疑问。

title: T1 Phone PR firm is ‘not assisting Trump Mobile any further’
summary: Trump Mobile's public relations firm, Poplar Group, has ended its representation of the company. This marks a shift in Trump Mobile's already limited media engagement as the company continues struggling to deliver preorders.
content:
Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We don't have the phones we preordered yet, but this week we received unexpected news from Trump Mobile's media relations manager.
If you've been following my reporting on the Trump phone, you'll know that Trump Mobile doesn't exactly keep open lines of communication with the media. That doesn't look to be changing, with the company no longer working with its long-term media relations firm.
Poplar Group has represented Trump Mobile since at least last June, when the company's founding partner Chris Walker gave a statement to USA Today, insisting at the time that "T1  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: T1 Phone公关公司"不再协助特朗普移动公司"
zh.summary: 特朗普移动公司的公关公司Poplar Group已终止对该公司的代理。这标志着特朗普移动公司已经有限的媒体参与发生了转变，因为该公司继续努力交付预订单。

title: In season 2 of Sugar, Colin Farrell’s quirky detective becomes much more human
summary: Season 2 of Apple TV's 'Sugar' premieres June 19th, with Colin Farrell's detective character becoming more human now that the show's sci-fi twist is public. Farrell describes feeling 'unburdened' to explore the character more openly after season one's secrecy requirements.
content:
When Colin Farrell was doing press for the first season of the detective series Sugar, he had to be very careful with how he spoke. Sugar is a story about a quirky private detective, but it's also secretly a work of science fiction, something that doesn't become clear until halfway through the season. "I knew that I could get the show in deep shit if I revealed certain things," he tells me. Now as Sugar heads into its next season, which starts streaming on Apple TV on June 19th, Farrell says he feels "unburdened" by the previous veil of secrecy. "There are certain things I wouldn't mention here about season 2," he says, "but nothing as big a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在《糖》第二季中，科林·法瑞尔古怪的侦探变得更加人性化
zh.summary: Apple TV《糖》第二季于6月19日首映，科林·法瑞尔的侦探角色变得更加人性化，因为该剧的科幻转折已经公开。法瑞尔描述在第一季的保密要求后，他感到"解放了"，可以更公开地探索这个角色。

title: Kaleidescape’s movie player blows streaming, and your wallet, away
summary: Kaleidescape's Strato E player offers a premium alternative to streaming services, using physical 4K media while maintaining a compact form factor. At $3,000, it targets consumers willing to trade streaming convenience for superior video quality and content ownership.
content:
The Strato E player (here with a Mini Terra Prime server on top of it) is smaller than a Blu-ray disc collection, but you can get a lot of 4K discs for $3,000.	

We've lost something in the past 15 years. Netflix, Amazon, Disney, Apple; they've all convinced us that streaming is the best way to watch movies and shows at home. With everything at our fingertips, there's no need to run to Blockbuster for the weekend's entertainment, or wait for a DVD rental to arrive in the mail. And going to the movie theater is a luxury - one that keeps getting more expensive.
But we were, all of us, deceived. We traded quality for convenience. And while TVs have improved drastically, we feed them inadequate, bitrate-starved, internet-throttled streams that won't let our fancy screens show their full potential. Blu-r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Kaleidescape电影播放器完胜流媒体，口袋也要被掏空
zh.summary: Kaleidescape的Strato E播放器为流媒体服务提供了高端替代方案，采用物理4K媒体，同时保持紧凑的外形。售价3000美元，面向愿意用流媒体便利性换取更优视频质量和内容所有权的消费者。

title: As global warming threatens corals, scientists search for reefs that can take the heat
summary: Scientists are identifying heat-resistant coral reefs that could survive rising ocean temperatures and help restore degraded ecosystems. These 'coral strongholds' offer potential solutions to coral bleaching caused by climate change.
content: Researchers say these coral strongholds may help repopulate more degraded reefs.

zh.title: 随着全球变暖威胁珊瑚，科学家寻找能抵抗高温的珊瑚礁
zh.summary: 科学家正在识别能够承受上升海洋温度并帮助恢复退化生态系统的耐热珊瑚礁。这些"珊瑚堡垒"为气候变化引起的珊瑚白化问题提供了潜在解决方案。

title: The US says ASML’s top chip tool may be in China. ASML says it isn’t
summary: The US government claims ASML's advanced chip manufacturing equipment may have reached China, while ASML denies the assertion. The dispute centers on export controls and ASML's commercial incentives against risking its export license.
content: There's a commercial logic that cuts against the idea that ASML would risk its export license to arm a Chinese customer.

zh.title: 美国称ASML顶级芯片工具可能在中国。ASML否认
zh.summary: 美国政府声称ASML的先进芯片制造设备可能已进入中国，而ASML否认了这一说法。争议围绕出口管制和ASML不愿冒失去出口许可证风险的商业考量展开。

title: Barret Zoph is out at OpenAI again after just five months
summary: Barret Zoph has left OpenAI after just five months as head of enterprise AI sales, only months after returning from co-founding Thinking Machines Lab with former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. His departure is notable given OpenAI's stated focus on enterprise sales as a key revenue driver ahead of its planned IPO.
content:
Five months after returning to OpenAI, Barret Zoph - the company's head of enterprise AI sales - has departed, The Verge has learned. 
Zoph returned to OpenAI in mid-January after a stint as co-founder and CTO of Thinking Machines Lab, the competing AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Shortly after Zoph returned to OpenAI, the company said he would lead its push into enterprise - a significant role at OpenAI, since in recent months it had vowed to stop chasing so-called "side quests" and focus on key revenue drivers like enterprise and coding ahead of its planned IPO. 
OpenAI confirmed to The Verge that Zoph will be depart …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Barret Zoph 在仅五个月后再次离开 OpenAI
zh.summary: Barret Zoph 在担任企业 AI 销售负责人五个月后离开 OpenAI，仅几个月前他从与前 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati 共同创办的 Thinking Machines Lab 回归。考虑到 OpenAI 声称企业销售是 IPO 前的关键收入驱动力，他的离职尤其值得关注。

title: Telegram ban in India sparks a rush to VPNs, rival apps
summary: India's ban on Telegram is driving users toward VPNs and alternative messaging apps, affecting millions of users. Telegram contends that banning the entire platform is excessive and argues for targeted content moderation instead. This highlights the tension between government content regulation and platform freedom.
content: Telegram argues India should block specific content, not an entire platform used by millions.

zh.title: 印度禁用Telegram引发用户争相使用VPN和竞争应用
zh.summary: 印度禁用Telegram促使用户转向VPN和替代即时通讯应用，影响数百万用户。Telegram辩称完全禁用该平台过于极端，主张进行有针对性的内容管制。这凸显了政府内容监管与平台自由之间的紧张关系。

title: Source: Elastic agrees to buy CRV-backed DeductiveAI for up to $85M
summary: Elastic has agreed to acquire DeductiveAI, an AI-powered bug detection and resolution startup, for up to $85 million. Founded just three years ago and backed by Craft Ventures, DeductiveAI represents Elastic's investment in AI-driven software quality tools. This acquisition signals growing demand for automated bug detection in development workflows.
content: DeductiveAI, a startup that uses AI to catch and resolve bugs in software, was founded just three years ago.

zh.title: 消息来源：Elastic同意以最高8500万美元收购CRV支持的DeductiveAI
zh.summary: Elastic已同意收购DeductiveAI，这是一家AI驱动的bug检测和解决方案初创公司，收购价格最高为8500万美元。DeductiveAI成立于三年前，由Craft Ventures支持，代表Elastic在AI驱动的软件质量工具方面的投资。此次收购表明开发工作流中对自动化bug检测的需求不断增长。

title: A bold satellite rescue mission came together in record time, but will it work?
summary: A satellite rescue mission was organized in record time, representing an ambitious attempt to recover a disabled satellite. Officials view the effort itself as a major achievement, even before determining whether the technical rescue will succeed. This showcases rapid coordination and planning in space operations.
content: "I consider this a success already, just from the fact that we're even going to try this."

zh.title: 大胆的卫星救援任务以创纪录的时间组织完成，但会成功吗？
zh.summary: 卫星救援任务以创纪录的速度组织完成，代表了一次雄心勃勃的尝试来修复一颗故障卫星。官员们认为这一努力本身就是一项重大成就，即使在确定技术救援是否会成功之前也是如此。这展示了太空操作中的快速协调和规划。
